case_title: SHAIKH, FATIMA U. vs. BELL, LEONARD et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, JACQULINE CHAN - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, FATIMA V. SHAIKH APPEARING AS PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. LEONARD BELL, DEFT. ROXANNE SIMPKINS PRESENT. (CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP AGAINST DEFT. LEONARD BELL, DISPOSITION FOR ROXANNE BELL)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, FATIMA U. AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, LEONARD SIMPKINS, ROXANNE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, LEONARD SIMPKINS, ROXANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ALDER HOTEL, 175 6TH ST. ROOM 325, STAYED UNTIL MAY-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, AS TO ROXANNE SIMPKINS: ALL BACK RENT WAIVED IF SHE AGREES TO VACATE PREMISES BEFORE 5/15/96. RENTAL FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE IF PREMISES NOT VACATED TIMELY. ROOM 325
